candidates.why: This is the company’s top-line revenue figure and explicitly labeled as Total Revenue with values across all years.
This is a cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
This is a total cost of revenues/cost of sales figure, not revenue.
Balancing adjustment for cost of sales, not revenue.

variables.notes: Clear dedicated revenue line used for REVT.

candidates.why: Primary operating cost line matching revenue; values align with Cost of Revenues - Total and represent cost of goods/services sold.
Label exists but shows no recent data in preview; appears unused compared to populated Cost of sales line.
Explicit balancing value adjustment, not the main COGS measure; should be excluded per rules.
Total version of cost of sales; duplicates Cost of sales values and includes the word Total, so prefer the component Cost of sales per instructions.

variables.notes: Chose the component cost line over the total/balancing versions per hierarchy rules.

candidates.why: Represents operating overhead costs separate from COGS and not labeled as a total; appropriate SG&A component.
General expenses are classic SG&A overhead; not a total/subtotal and not COGS, D&A, interest, or tax.
Personnel-related overhead costs (wages and social costs) that fit within SG&A; not part of COGS here and not a total line.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A line; using the available overhead components per instructions.
No research and development related row is present among candidates; treat R&D expense as zero for this mapping.

candidates.why: Core interest expense on loan borrowings; this is the primary interest expense component and should be included in XINT.
Interest portion of lease liabilities; also an interest expense and should be included in XINT alongside loan interest.
Relates to minority interest, not interest expense on debt; should not be used for XINT.

candidates.why: EPS disclosure for non-controlling interest; unrelated to interest expense.

Balance sheet liability balance, not an expense; do not use for XINT.

Balance sheet liability balance, not an expense; do not use for XINT.
Equity attributable to non-controlling interests; not an interest expense item.

candidates.why: Appears to be a component of equity but is empty/undefined in preview; not the total book equity figure.
Represents total shareholders’ equity as shown on the balance sheet; matches total equity needed for BE.
Technical balancing line, not the substantive equity total; should be excluded per rules.
Balancing line, not the equity account itself.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for the accounting identity; not equity alone.
Represents total assets/LIAB+EQ; not pure equity, so not appropriate for BE.

variables.notes: Selected the main Equity total as book equity, excluding balancing and composite lines.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation to NCI; represents earnings to minorities, not the balance sheet minority interest amount needed for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Of which non-controlling ownership interests Earnings per share

Balance sheet line representing equity attributable to non-controlling (minority) interests; matches MIB definition.
